events.title: Launch
events.description: SLS launches Artemis I from LC-39B.

events.title: Closest lunar approach
events.description: Orion passes about 130 km above the Moon.

events.title: Distant retrograde orbit entry
events.description: Orion settles into distant retrograde orbit.

events.title: Return lunar flyby
events.description: Final lunar flyby bends Orion onto Earth return.

events.title: Splashdown
events.description: Artemis I returns to the Pacific.
